member.name: T:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Diagnostics.LogEntryEventArgs
member.summary: Provides data for the log entry event handlers.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Diagnostics.LogEntryEventArgs.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates an information type entry with the given message text for the event log, using the specified event source.
member.param: The application event source.
The string to write to the event log.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Diagnostics.LogEntryEventArgs.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Diagnostics.EventLogEntryType)
member.summary: Creates an error, warning, information, success audit, or failure audit entry with the given message text for the event log, using the specified event source.
member.param: The application event source.
The string to write to the event log.
One of the values.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Diagnostics.LogEntryEventArgs.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Diagnostics.EventLogEntryType,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates an entry with the given message text and application-defined event identifier for the event log, using the specified event source.
member.param: The application event source.
The string to write to the event log.
One of the values.
The application-specific identifier for the event.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Diagnostics.LogEntryEventArgs.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Diagnostics.EventLogEntryType,System.Int32,System.Int16)
member.summary: Creates an entry with the given message text, application-defined event identifier, and application-defined category for the event log, using the specified event source. The can be used by the Event Viewer to filter events in the log.
member.param: The application event source.
The string to write to the event log.
One of the values.
The application-specific identifier for the event.
The application-specific subcategory associated with the message.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Diagnostics.LogEntryEventArgs.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Diagnostics.EventLogEntryType,System.Int32,System.Int16,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Creates an entry with the given message text, application-defined event identifier, and application-defined category for the event log (using the specified event source) and appends binary data to it.
member.param: The application event source.
The string to write to the event log.
One of the values.
The application-specific identifier for the event.
The application-specific subcategory associated with the message.
An array of bytes that holds the binary data associated with the entry.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Diagnostics.LogEntryEventArgs.IsValidEventSource(System.String)
member.summary: Determines whether the given event source string is valid, i.e. not a null reference and not empty.
member.param: The name of the event source.
member.returns: true iff the event source string is valid.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Diagnostics.LogEntryEventArgs.Category
member.summary: The application-specific subcategory associated with the message.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Diagnostics.LogEntryEventArgs.EntryType
member.summary: Entry type. One of the values.
member.remarks: Specifies the event type of an event log entry.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Diagnostics.LogEntryEventArgs.EventId
member.summary: The application-specific identifier for the event.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Diagnostics.LogEntryEventArgs.Message
member.summary: The message text.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Diagnostics.LogEntryEventArgs.RawData
member.summary: An array of bytes that holds the binary data associated with the entry.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Diagnostics.LogEntryEventArgs.Source
member.summary: The name of the event source.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Diagnostics.LogEntryEventArgs.Timestamp
member.summary: Date and time of the log entry message.

member.name: T:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Diagnostics.Resource1
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Diagnostics.Resource1.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Diagnostics.Resource1.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Diagnostics.Resource1.NotABooleanSwitch
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The switch name denotes an existing switch that is not a boolean switch..

member.name: T:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Net.NetworkCredentialSurrogate
member.summary: For XML serialization.

member.name: T:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Sign
member.summary: None, positive, or negative sign.

member.name: F:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Sign.Negative
member.summary: Negative sign.

member.name: F:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Sign.None
member.summary: No sign.

member.name: F:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Sign.Positive
member.summary: Positive sign.

member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Attempting to change an object of type '{0}' to type '{1}'..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The specified original number was {0}..

member.summary: This namespace contains classes that work with graphs.

member.summary: This namespace contains commonly used fundamental and supporting classes.

member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Extensions.Resource1.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Extensions.Resource1.ArrayExtension_Add_NotSingleDimensional
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Attempt to add to an array that is not single-dimensional..

member.name: P:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Extensions.Resource1.AssemblyExtension_SafeCreateInstance_TypeLoadFailure
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Failed to load type '{0}' from assembly '{1}'..

member.name: P:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Extensions.Resource1.DictionaryExtension_ExistingKey
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Attempt to add existing key into a dictionary..

member.name: P:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Extensions.Resource1.DictionaryExtension_NonExistingKey
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Attempt to remove non-existing key from a dictionary..

member.name: P:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Extensions.Resource1.ExceptionExtension_AddDetail_NoInternalMessage
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Cannot add detail to an exception of type '{0}' that has no internal message..

member.name: P:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Extensions.Resource1.ExceptionExtension_InternalMessageNotAvailable
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The InternalMessage logical extension property of the Exception type is not available..

member.name: P:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Extensions.Resource1.HashSetExtension_ExistingItem
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Attempt to add existing item into a hash set..

member.name: P:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Extensions.Resource1.HashSetExtension_NonExistingItem
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Attempt to remove non-existing item from a hash set..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Attempt to add existing item into a keyed collection..

member.name: P:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Extensions.Resource1.ListExtension_ExistingItem
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The item already exists in the list..

member.name: T:OpcLabs.BaseLib.MemberNotFoundException
member.summary: An exception thrown when the member with the specified name has not been found.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.BaseLib.MemberNotFoundException.#ctor(System.String)

overloads.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.param: The name of the member that has not been found.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.BaseLib.MemberNotFoundException.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.param: The message that describes the error.
The name of the member that has not been found.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.BaseLib.MemberNotFoundException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception,System.String)
member.param: The message that describes the error.
The exception that is the cause of the current exception, or a null reference (Nothing in Visual Basic) if no inner exception is specified.
The name of the member that has not been found.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.BaseLib.MemberNotFoundException.GetObjectData(System.Runtime.Serialization.SerializationInfo,System.Runtime.Serialization.StreamingContext)
member.summary: Sets the with information about the exception.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.BaseLib.MemberNotFoundException.MemberName
member.summary: The name of the member that has not been found.

member.name: T:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Graphs.ITreeEnumerable`1
member.summary: Exposes the tree enumerator, which supports iteration over a tree of nodes of a specified type.
member.typeparam: The type of objects to enumerate.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Graphs.ITreeEnumerable`1.GetTreeEnumerator
member.summary: Returns a tree enumerator that iterates through the tree.
member.returns: An that can be used to iterate through the tree.

member.name: T:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Graphs.ITreeEnumerator`1
member.summary: Supports iteration over a generic tree.
member.typeparam: The type of objects to enumerate.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Graphs.ITreeEnumerator`1.GetChildEnumerator
member.summary: Returns a tree enumerator that iterates through the child nodes of current node.
member.returns: An that can be used to iterate through the child nodes.

member.name: T:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Resource1
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Resource1.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Resource1.AssemblyLoader_AddUseLegacyV2RuntimeActivationPolicyTrue
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to In order to load the required mixed mode assembly, please add useLegacyV2RuntimeActivationPolicy="true" attribute to the 'startup' element in the configuration file. For more details, see documentation for this attribute on MSDN..

member.name: P:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Resource1.AssemblyLoader_LoadExtended_NullSimpleName
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Attempt to extended load of assembly with a null simple name..

member.name: P:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Resource1.Cls_ArrayRankNotPositive
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to CLS-compliant arrays must have a fixed number of dimensions, greater than zero..

member.name: P:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Resource1.Cls_CannotConvertObjectToClsCompliantType
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Cannot convert object to CLS-compliant type..

member.name: P:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Resource1.Cls_CannotDetermineArrayElementType
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Cannot determine array element type when converting to CLS-compliant type..

member.name: P:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Resource1.Cls_ConvertToClsArray_AllArrayDimensionsMustHaveZeroLowerBound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to All dimensions of a CLS-compliant array must have a zero lower bound..

member.name: P:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Resource1.Cls_NoClsCompliantTypeForArrayElements
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to There is no CLS-compliant type for the array elements..

member.name: P:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Resource1.HandleManager_NonExistingHandle
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Attempt to free non-existing handle from the manager..

member.name: P:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Resource1.MemberNotFoundException_DefaultMessage
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The member with the specified name has not been found..

member.name: T:JetBrains.Annotations.LocalizationRequiredAttribute
member.summary: Indicates that marked element should be localized or not.

member.name: M:JetBrains.Annotations.LocalizationRequiredAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: true if a element should be localized; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:JetBrains.Annotations.LocalizationRequiredAttribute.Equals(System.Object)
member.summary: Returns whether the value of the given object is equal to the current .
member.param: The object to test the value equality of.
member.returns: true if the value of the given object is equal to that of the current; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:JetBrains.Annotations.LocalizationRequiredAttribute.GetHashCode
member.summary: Returns the hash code for this instance.
member.returns: A hash code for the current .

member.name: P:JetBrains.Annotations.LocalizationRequiredAttribute.Required
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether a element should be localized. true if a element should be localized; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:JetBrains.Annotations.StringFormatMethodAttribute
member.summary: Indicates that marked method builds string by format pattern and (optional) arguments. Parameter, which contains format string, should be given in constructor. The format string should be in -like form

member.name: M:JetBrains.Annotations.StringFormatMethodAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes new instance of StringFormatMethodAttribute
member.param: Specifies which parameter of an annotated method should be treated as format-string

member.name: P:JetBrains.Annotations.StringFormatMethodAttribute.FormatParameterName
member.summary: Gets format parameter name

member.name: T:JetBrains.Annotations.InvokerParameterNameAttribute
member.summary: Indicates that the function argument should be string literal and match one of the parameters of the caller function. For example, has such parameter.

member.name: T:JetBrains.Annotations.AssertionMethodAttribute
member.summary: Indicates that the marked method is assertion method, i.e. it halts control flow if one of the conditions is satisfied. To set the condition, mark one of the parameters with attribute

member.name: T:JetBrains.Annotations.AssertionConditionAttribute
member.summary: Indicates the condition parameter of the assertion method. The method itself should be marked by attribute. The mandatory argument of the attribute is the assertion type.

member.name: M:JetBrains.Annotations.AssertionConditionAttribute.#ctor(JetBrains.Annotations.AssertionConditionType)
member.summary: Initializes new instance of AssertionConditionAttribute
member.param: Specifies condition type

member.name: P:JetBrains.Annotations.AssertionConditionAttribute.ConditionType
member.summary: Gets condition type

member.name: T:JetBrains.Annotations.AssertionConditionType
member.summary: Specifies assertion type. If the assertion method argument satisifes the condition, then the execution continues. Otherwise, execution is assumed to be halted

member.name: F:JetBrains.Annotations.AssertionConditionType.IS_TRUE
member.summary: Indicates that the marked parameter should be evaluated to true

member.name: F:JetBrains.Annotations.AssertionConditionType.IS_FALSE
member.summary: Indicates that the marked parameter should be evaluated to false

member.name: F:JetBrains.Annotations.AssertionConditionType.IS_NULL
member.summary: Indicates that the marked parameter should be evaluated to null value

member.name: F:JetBrains.Annotations.AssertionConditionType.IS_NOT_NULL
member.summary: Indicates that the marked parameter should be evaluated to not null value

member.name: T:JetBrains.Annotations.TerminatesProgramAttribute
member.summary: Indicates that the marked method unconditionally terminates control flow execution. For example, it could unconditionally throw exception

member.name: T:JetBrains.Annotations.CanBeNullAttribute
member.summary: Indicates that the value of marked element could be null sometimes, so the check for null is necessary before its usage

member.name: T:JetBrains.Annotations.NotNullAttribute
member.summary: Indicates that the value of marked element could never be null

member.name: T:JetBrains.Annotations.CannotApplyEqualityOperatorAttribute
member.summary: Indicates that the value of marked type (or its derivatives) cannot be compared using '==' or '!=' operators. There is only exception to compare with null, it is permitted

member.name: T:JetBrains.Annotations.BaseTypeRequiredAttribute
member.summary: When applied to target attribute, specifies a requirement for any type which is marked with target attribute to implement or inherit specific type or types

member.name: M:JetBrains.Annotations.BaseTypeRequiredAttribute.#ctor(System.Type)
member.summary: Initializes new instance of BaseTypeRequiredAttribute
member.param: Specifies which types are required

member.name: P:JetBrains.Annotations.BaseTypeRequiredAttribute.BaseTypes
member.summary: Gets enumerations of specified base types

member.name: T:JetBrains.Annotations.UsedImplicitlyAttribute
member.summary: Indicates that the marked symbol is used implicitly (e.g. via reflection, in external library), so this symbol will not be marked as unused (as well as by other usage inspections)

member.name: P:JetBrains.Annotations.UsedImplicitlyAttribute.TargetFlags
member.summary: Gets value indicating what is meant to be used

member.name: T:JetBrains.Annotations.MeansImplicitUseAttribute
member.summary: Should be used on attributes and causes ReSharper to not mark symbols marked with such attributes as unused (as well as by other usage inspections)

member.name: P:JetBrains.Annotations.MeansImplicitUseAttribute.TargetFlags
member.summary: Gets value indicating what is meant to be used

member.name: F:JetBrains.Annotations.ImplicitUseKindFlags.Access
member.summary: Only entity marked with attribute considered used

member.name: F:JetBrains.Annotations.ImplicitUseKindFlags.Assign
member.summary: Indicates implicit assignment to a member

member.name: F:JetBrains.Annotations.ImplicitUseKindFlags.InstantiatedWithFixedConstructorSignature
member.summary: Indicates implicit instantiation of a type with fixed constructor signature. That means any unused constructor parameters won't be reported as such.

member.name: F:JetBrains.Annotations.ImplicitUseKindFlags.InstantiatedNoFixedConstructorSignature
member.summary: Indicates implicit instantiation of a type

member.name: T:JetBrains.Annotations.ImplicitUseTargetFlags
member.summary: Specify what is considered used implicitly when marked with or

member.name: F:JetBrains.Annotations.ImplicitUseTargetFlags.Members
member.summary: Members of entity marked with attribute are considered used

member.name: F:JetBrains.Annotations.ImplicitUseTargetFlags.WithMembers
member.summary: Entity marked with attribute and all its members considered used

member.name: T:JetBrains.Annotations.PublicAPIAttribute
member.summary: This attribute is intended to mark publicly available API which should not be removed and so is treated as used.

member.name: T:JetBrains.Annotations.InstantHandleAttribute
member.summary: Tells code analysis engine if the parameter is completely handled when the invoked method is on stack. If the parameter is delegate, indicates that delegate is executed while the method is executed. If the parameter is enumerable, indicates that it is enumerated while the method is executed.

member.name: T:JetBrains.Annotations.PureAttribute
member.summary: Indicates that method doesn't contain observable side effects. The same as

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.Contracts.ContractArgumentValidatorAttribute
member.summary: Enables factoring legacy if-then-throw into separate methods for reuse and full control over thrown exception and arguments

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.Contracts.ContractAbbreviatorAttribute
member.summary: Enables writing abbreviations for contracts that get copied to other methods

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.Contracts.ContractOptionAttribute
member.summary: Allows setting contract and tool options at assembly, type, or method granularity.

member.name: T:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Graphs.TreeTraversalEnumerable`1
member.summary: is an "adapter" that converts to by flattening the tree.
member.typeparam: The type of objects to enumerate.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.BaseLib.Graphs.TreeTraversalEnumerable`1.#ctor(OpcLabs.BaseLib.Graphs.ITreeEnumerable{`0})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with given underlying tree.
member.param: The tree enumerable to be flattened.
